title: Palladium Morphus characteristic
description: One Morphus characteristic row from the Nightbane Core Rulebook Morphus tables (pp. 85–93). Compiled at runtime via morphusCharacteristicAggregation.

tableCategory.description: Morphus table group label (e.g. Biomechanical, Animal).

gameSystems.description: Game lines this characteristic applies to (e.g. nightbane). Must align with sources[].gameSystem slugs.

sources.description: Book and page citations for this Morphus characteristic row.

progressionModifiers.description: Persistent per-level growth modifiers applied on top of normal class/race progression.

naturalAr.description: Absolute natural A.R. granted by this trait (not a polymorphic modifier). Stacked by the master A.R. parser.

magicInteractionModifiers.description: How incoming magic/psionic effects and durations are scaled.

isPolymorphicTemplate.description: When true, tells the frontend presentation sheet that this morphus choice acts as a dynamic archetype wrapper capable of altering its visual skin and spawning minor temporary S.D.C. shields at execution time.

gimmickInventory.description: Spawned Morphus gadgets (Dark Designs Clown/Jester pp. 29–33; Hobbyist; Superbeing Gadgeteer pp. 60–62).

gimmickToySwitches.description: Wind-up keys, knobs, and body switches with fixed toy-like effects (Survival Guide Biomechanical III, pp. 83–84).

disabledNaturalAttackTags.description: Natural attack limb types disabled while this trait is active (e.g. oversized shoes block kicks).

activatedAbilities.description: Limited burst abilities with charge pools (Dark Designs Gear-Head, pp. 33–35).

specialCombatInterceptions.description: Specialized parry/intercept rules (shadow, lasers, bare-handed melee).

customOneOffs.description: Narrative rules not yet modeled in structured fields (always show in trait notes).

entryRole.description: trait = playable Morphus result; table_router = Step-One style redirect (e.g. disproportion body area); subtable_header = section label only.

variantPercentiles.description: Inner percentile sub-rolls within one trait (e.g. Junk Golem junk type 01-25%, Mirror Man mirror style).

crossTableRoll.description: Requires rolling on another Morphus table (e.g. Stuffed Animal → Animal Form).

morphusRules.description: Legacy tagged rules — prefer appearanceConstraints, combatContextModifiers, recoveryBehaviors, atWillAbilities, and extended sensory/mobility fields.

appearanceConstraints.description: Clothing fit, narrow-space access, and contextual hiding/blending.

combatContextModifiers.description: Conditional combat adjustments (opponent penalties, surprise bonuses, grappling affordances).

recoveryBehaviors.description: Reform, immobilization, and waterlog recovery profiles.

conditionalPenalties.description: Environmental triggers that scale stats (cold halving Spd/APM, etc.).

atWillAbilities.description: Always-available Morphus abilities (Mirror Walk, stand motionless, etc.).

tableWorkflow.description: Multi-step table instructions (roll twice on Step One, etc.).

livingWeaponRules.description: Living Morphus weapon durability and attachment rules.

skillContextModifiers.description: Skill bonuses/penalties tied to lighting, terrain, or context.

sources.description: Book references keyed by gameSystem slug. Use one entry per book when page numbers differ. Put only the book title (plus edition if useful) in reference, and the printed start page in pageNumber.

gameSystem.description: Slug identifying the game line (must align with gameSystems, e.g. nightbane).

reference.description: Book title only (edition if relevant)—no page numbers in this string.

pageNumber.description: Printed page where this Morphus characteristic entry begins for that book.

percent.description: Percentage adjustment applied to the underlying metric.

maxValue.description: Optional upper cap after applying modifier math (e.g. maximum A.R. 19).

isOverride.description: When true, the associated calculation overwrites the base value entirely instead of additive stacking (middleware engine).

variableScaleConditions.description: Documented conditional scalar tiers (e.g. balloon count penalties) for UI and future tier resolvers.

resourceType.description: Pool spent when the natural weapon or gimmick effect activates.

value.description: Amount deducted from resourceType on activation.

id.description: Stable slug referenced by subTraitChoicesBudget.allowedChoicesPool (e.g. gadget_lock_pick).

itemName.description: Spawned gadget label (e.g. Seltzer Bottle, Joy Buzzer).

sdc.description: Structural capacity of the spawned item.

usageLimit.description: Optional fixed uses per regeneration window before depletion.

usageLimitFormula.description: Dice formula for consumable count (e.g. 1D6+2 Eggshell grenades).

regenerationRule.description: When the gadget or its uses replenish (per_24_hours = Dark Designs Gadgeteer re-materialize).

effectFormula.description: Damage, range, or effect dice/formula for the gimmick payload.

components.description: Sub-parts with their own S.D.C. (e.g. Glide Pack wings at 50 S.D.C. each).

statModifiers.description: Passive bonuses while this gadget is owned and intact (e.g. Glide Pack +1 dodge).

skillGrants.description: Morphus-only skill overrides tied to this gadget (e.g. Lock Pick Tool at 50%).

traitFlags.description: Operational flags for spawned gimmick items.

activationCost.description: HP/PPE/ISP/SDC spent to activate the gimmick payload (e.g. Squirt Flower blood/acid squirt).

rangeFeet.description: Maximum effective range of the gimmick attack or effect in feet.

customOneOffs.description: Narrative rules for this spawned item not yet modeled in structured fields.

weaponTraits.description: Tactical weapon flags (Dark Designs Ancient Warrior, pp. 18–20).

damageModifier.description: Scales resolved damage from damageFormula (e.g. Warlord +50% percent).

activationCost.description: Health or energy sacrifice to activate this natural weapon (Clown table payload costs).

conditionalTargetModifiers.description: Conditional damage scaling versus specific enemy groups (e.g. Nightlords, undead).

extraAttacks.description: Bonus attacks per melee granted exclusively when using this weapon.

rangeFeet.description: Maximum effective range of the weapon/attack in feet.

targetEnemies.description: Enemy tags this modifier applies to (e.g. nightlords, demons, undead, creatures_of_magic).

damageFlat.description: Flat damage added when the target is in targetEnemies.

damageMultiplier.description: Damage multiplier applied when the target is in targetEnemies.

percent.description: Percentage adjustment to baseline weapon damage output.

flat.description: Flat adjustment applied after percent scaling.

limbDestructionConditionOverrides.description: Injected when component S.D.C. reaches 0 (Gear-Head sub-component destruction).

ar.description: Localized Armor Rating for this component.

calledShotPenalty.description: Strike penalty when this component is targeted (e.g. -3).

requiresCalledShot.description: When true, attackers must make a Called Shot to target this component (Very Small Head).

destructionConditionOverrides.description: Stat/affinity overrides applied when this limb's S.D.C. is depleted.

abilityName.description: Burst ability label (e.g. Nitrous Oxide Injection).

durationFormula.description: Active duration dice or text (e.g. 1D6 minutes).

statModifiers.description: Modifiers active only while the burst duration runs.

interceptAction.description: Specialized intercept channel (Gear-Head elemental exceptions; Athlete projectile catch).

ar.description: Relative Armor Rating shift (supports negative flat values, e.g. {"flat": -2}).

ppePerLevel.description: Additive modifier applied to normal P.P.E gain each time the character levels (e.g. +3 per level).

ispPerLevel.description: Additive modifier applied to normal I.S.P gain each level.

effectDurationMultiplier.description: Scalar for incoming effect or duration (0 none, 0.5 half, 1 normal, 2 double).

mindControl.description: Save vs mind control (distinct from possession where rules apply separately).

nauseaVomiting.description: Save vs nausea/vomiting from foul odors and airborne toxins.

immunities.description: Absolute save immunities for this trait (e.g. impervious to possession or mind control).

noBreathingRequired.description: When true, this Morphus does not require breathing in normal or aquatic environments.

surfaceTypes.description: Terrain surfaces this row applies to (Dark Designs Athlete / Skates, pp. 28–29).

spdMultiplier.description: Spd acceleration scale on matching surfaces (e.g. 2.0 hard flat, 0.5 rough uneven).

skillModifiers.description: Surface-isolated skill penalties or bonuses (e.g. Skates −20% Prowl on hard floors).

stanceType.description: Posture gate for stance-dependent stat swaps (Ancient Warrior centaur / cloak; Artisan costume context).

statModifiers.description: Attribute/combat modifiers active only while this stance applies.

entityName.description: Mount or sub-entity label (e.g. Warhorse Centaur Lower Body).

statModifiers.description: Dedicated bonuses for the companion entity profile.

poolSharingRule.description: How H.P./S.D.C. pools split between rider and companion.

conditionalStanceModifiers.description: Stance-dependent stat modifier swaps (mounted, prone, etc.).

burrowingEngine.description: Subterranean traversal rate and permitted substrates (Dark Designs Artisan, pp. 25–27).

balanceModifierPercent.description: Percent bonus/penalty to sense of balance (Disproportion Huge Feet, Short Legs).

reachPercentBonus.description: Melee reach extension percent (Unusually Long Arms).

jumpMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to jump distance/height after flat bonuses (Huge Legs: 2).

minimumJumpFeet.description: Minimum jump height/distance in feet when jumpMultiplier applies.

waterlogMinutesDice.description: Minutes until buoyant Morphus sinks after waterlogging (Stuffed Animal).

feetPerMeleeRound.description: Burrow distance per melee round (e.g. Chisel Fingers 3 ft).

allowedSubstrates.description: Ground types this burrow profile may traverse.

externalSensoryObfuscation.description: Identity / recording defenses against external capture (Artisan table).

peripheralVisionDegrees.description: Peripheral vision arc in degrees (Huge Eyes 180, Tiny Eyes 90).

scentTracking.description: Track-by-scent profile and odor identification modifiers.

darknessInvisibilityPercent.description: Chance to be invisible in darkness (Shadow Man).

opponentTrackingBonusPercent.description: Passive opponent tracking bonus against this Morphus (e.g. strong blood/odor trail).

opponentPerceptionBonusFlat.description: Flat bonus granted to opponents' Perception Rolls to notice this character (e.g., due to loud/bright/ornate traits).

whisperHearingRangeFeet.description: Distance at which a whisper can be heard clearly.

targetValue.description: When **targetType** is **skill_trait**, use a registry id (e.g. **requires_dexterity**, **requires_light_touch**) from **skill_trait_registry.json**.

impossibleInMorphus.description: When true, the skill cannot be used in Morphus (character sheet shows Impossible). Prefer over isNegated for new data.

perLevelIncrement.description: Per-level increment stacked on modifierPercent or grantUnlearnedValue (e.g. Gymnast Build 68% base +4% per level).

levelInterval.description: Levels between each chance increase (e.g. every 3 levels).

chanceBonus.description: Percent added per interval (e.g. +3% every 3 levels).

rollName.description: Printed narrative check label (e.g. Spontaneous Insight).

baseSuccessChance.description: Base success percent before level scaling.

levelIntervalScaling.description: Optional per-interval success growth with character level.

globalSkillModifier.description: Flat percentage applied to all skill checks.

customSystemRolls.description: Narrative / psychic percentile checks not tied to the skill catalog (Artisan table).

damageAffinityMultiplier.description: Vulnerability tier: 0 none, 0.1 tenth, 0.25 quarter, 0.5 half, 1 normal, 1.5 increased, 2 double.

magicEnergy.description: Magical energy attacks (e.g. spell energy blasts); distinct from generic magic saves.

bypassesSdcAndArmor.description: Damage channels that bypass S.D.C. and armor protections.

slotsAvailable.description: Fixed number of picks from allowedChoicesPool.

slotsFormula.description: Dice formula for how many picks (e.g. 1D4+2 Gadgeteer gadgets).

allowedChoicesPool.description: Ids from gimmickInventory entries or other sub-trait slugs the player may select.

occupiesHands.description: Physical hands/limbs locked while natively wielding or holding this morphus item.

blocksTwoHandedWeapons.description: When true, enforces inventory lockout for two-handed weapons if free hand slots are insufficient.

gimmickToySwitchLocation.description: Body area where the control is mounted; effect should relate to this region.

gimmickToyEffectKind.description: Preset effect id from presetEffectCatalog, or custom with inline mechanics.

displayName.description: Printed label when effectKind is custom or overrides preset name.

durationMeleeRounds.description: Melee rounds the effect lasts when not using durationFormula.

usesPerPeriod.description: Limited uses per resetPeriod (e.g. four missiles).

spdMultiplierWhileActive.description: Spd scale while effect runs (e.g. 2.0 double speed, 0.3 after 70% reduction).

statModifiersWhileActive.description: Combat/stat shifts only while the switch effect is active.

notes.description: Narrative rules not yet modeled in structured fields.

windUpKeyOnBack.description: Large wind-up key protruding from the back.

label.description: Optional player label for this switch.

effectRef.description: References presetEffectCatalog[].id when effect is not inlined.

presetEffectCatalog.description: All G.M.-approved preset effects; assign one fixed effect per physical switch at creation.

assignedSwitches.description: Fixed switch-to-effect mapping (filled at character creation).

gmApprovalRequiredForCustom.description: Player-suggested switch effects need G.M. approval.

weightModifier.description: Weight adjustment for this inner sub-roll (e.g. Junk Golem double vs triple weight by junk type).

targetTableId.description: Morphus table id slug (e.g. animal_form, sci-fi).

targetTableName.description: Printed book reference when id differs from display name.

note.description: Scaling notes (e.g. half S.D.C. and bonuses from Animal Form).

params.description: Optional machine-readable parameters (dice, durations, skill ids).

daylightVisionMultiplier.description: Multiplier to normal daylight vision (0.5 = half).

perceptionVisionPenalty.description: Penalty to Perception Rolls involving vision in well-lit areas.

enabled.description: When false, character cannot track by scent.

perLevelIncrement.description: Percent added per level of experience.

identifyOdorsModifierPercent.description: Modifier to identify-odors skill checks (Tiny Nose -10).

clothingFit.description: How standard clothing fits this Morphus.

narrowOpeningAccess.description: Whether the body fits or struggles through narrow openings.

hideAmongContext.description: Context where the character blends in (store mannequins).

standMotionlessIndefinitely.description: Can hold perfectly still for any duration.

condition.description: When this modifier applies (e.g. visual_engagement for moving tattoos or hypnotic patterns).

grapplingAffordance.description: Special grappling interaction granted by this Morphus.

naturalArFlat.description: Natural A.R. applied in this context (No Bones vs grapples).

damagePerRound.description: Damage formula per round (On Fire contact).

horrorFactorFlat.description: Flat Horror Factor adjustment in this context.

blindChancePercent.description: Chance to blind onlookers (Crystalline reflected light).

lockoutHoursDice.description: Morphus unavailable duration when returning to Facade.

dryHoursDice.description: Hours to recover from immobilization (Soft Clay).

stepOneRollCount.description: Roll Step One this many times (Disproportion: 2).

excludeSelfFromReroll.description: Exclude the 'roll twice' router row from Step One rerolls.

vanishesWhenBothZero.description: Weapon vanishes if weapon S.D.C. and character S.D.C. both reach zero.

preferredWeapon.description: Character prefers this weapon and feels vulnerable without it.

context.description: Lighting, terrain, or outfit context for the skill adjustment (e.g. costumed for Artisan outfit-specific bonuses).
